name: cogni-copywriting
description: Professional copywriting toolkit providing document polishing with messaging frameworks (BLUF, Pyramid, SCQA, STAR, PSB, FAB), arc-aware narrative polishing (cogni-narrative integration), stakeholder review via parallel persona Q&A, readability optimization, sales enhancement (Power Positions), and multi-language support (English/German).

plugins.name: cogni-copywriting
plugins.description: Professional copywriting toolkit with arc-aware narrative polishing, messaging frameworks, stakeholder review, and sales enhancement.
